title: Elon Musk Testifies: 'I Want to Save Humanity' in OpenAI Trial
summary: Elon Musk took the stand in his high-profile trial against Sam Altman, framing himself as a visionary aiming to protect humanity. He recounted his journey from South Africa to Silicon Valley, emphasizing his long-term goals for AI.
body:
Elon Musk testified in court today, positioning himself as a savior of humanity amid his legal battle with Sam Altman. The trial centers on the future of OpenAI, the AI research lab they co-founded. Musk detailed his background, from his upbringing in South Africa to his arrival in Canada with just $2,500, setting the stage for his narrative as a driven innovator.

Musk's testimony underscores the stark contrast between his vision and Altman's leadership at OpenAI. While Musk advocates for cautious, human-aligned AI development, Altman has pushed for rapid commercialization. The trial could reshape the AI industry, determining who controls the direction of one of the most influential AI organizations in the world.

Reactions to Musk's testimony have been mixed, with some praising his long-term vision and others questioning his motives. The outcome of the trial will likely influence the trajectory of AI research and ethics. Key questions remain: Will Musk's vision prevail, or will Altman's approach dominate the future of AI?
twitterThread:
🚨 Elon Musk just took the stand and said his mission is to 'save humanity.'

The stakes? Control of OpenAI.

This trial could change everything. 🧵
Musk painted himself as the underdog, recounting his journey from South Africa to Silicon Valley with just $2,500. He framed himself as a visionary fighting for humanity's future.
Here's why this matters: The trial pits Musk's cautious AI vision against Sam Altman's push for rapid commercialization. The outcome could reshape the entire AI industry.
The wild part? Musk's testimony highlights the deep rift within OpenAI. He's positioning himself as the guardian of ethical AI, while Altman drives for profit and scale.
This changes everything for the future of AI. Will Musk's long-term vision win out, or will Altman's approach dominate? The jury's decision will be pivotal.
standaloneTweet: Elon Musk just testified that his mission is to 'save humanity' in his legal battle with Sam Altman. The future of OpenAI—and AI itself—hangs in the balance. 🚨
